Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: Victorian formal attire, halved black top hat, underarm holster
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: Early 20s male, pale ivory skin, short black hair, deep-set dark brown eyes, wearing a halved black top hat and formal suit with an underarm holster for a bronze-cylindered revolver.
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Claims to have lost recent memories (amnesia)
Klein Moretti.accessories: Cane, newspaper, revolver with wooden handle and bronze cylinder
Klein Moretti.role: Civilian staff at Blackthorn Security Company
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Describes his practice attire and specific weapon details (bronze cylinder, wooden handle).

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: Linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat
Benson Moretti.face_description: Resembles Klein but lacks the scholarly air, looks older than his actual age due to work stress.
Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, pale skin, short black hair, wearing working class Victorian attire, showing signs of fatigue
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Text explicitly mentions he 'touched his receding black hairline'.

Melissa Moretti.primary_clothing: wears a tattered veil cap and carries a self-sewn bag
Melissa Moretti.visual_anchor: teenage female, pale skin, long wavy black hair, wearing a simple, slightly worn Victorian dress
Melissa Moretti.color_palette: faded blue, grey, white, soft brown
Melissa Moretti.source_notes: Text explicitly mentions 'brown eyes' and 'shallow dimples'.

Mr. Franky.primary_clothing: top hat, a vest, and a black suit
Mr. Franky.face_description: sharp, slightly pinched face from being a strict landlord
Mr. Franky.visual_anchor: short, thin older male, pale skin, short grey hair, wearing a top hat, a vest, and a black suit, carrying a walking stick
Mr. Franky.source_notes: Explicitly described in the text as a short, thin gentleman wearing a top hat, a vest, and a black suit, and flailing a walking stick.

Dunn Smith.face_description: A mature face with a slightly high hairline and deep, abstruse gray eyes. His expression is often calm, sometimes featuring a polite but unusual smile.
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: late 30s male, fair skin, short dark brown hair with a high receding hairline, deep gray eyes, wearing a black top hat and a knee-length black trench coat, holding a tobacco pipe
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: Enjoys smoking tobacco mixed with mint leaves
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Appears in Klein's dream wearing a black trench coat and halved top hat with calm gray eyes.

Thin Intruder.primary_clothing: dark charcoal commoner's jacket, simple worn trousers, dark boots
Thin Intruder.face_description: Sharp, narrow face with a pointed nose and thin lips; features obscured by shadows.
Thin Intruder.visual_anchor: Thin male figure in dark Victorian commoner's clothing, seen from behind rummaging through a desk in a dark room.
Thin Intruder.source_notes: Described as a 'thin but unfamiliar back' standing at Klein's desk. Physical traits guessed based on 'thin' description.

Welch McGovern.primary_clothing: Expensive Victorian gentleman suit, pale blue waistcoat, white cravat, gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.face_description: Soft features of a wealthy youth, rounded chin, bright curious eyes, friendly expression
Welch McGovern.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, light brown hair, blue eyes, wearing an expensive pale blue Victorian waistcoat and a gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.distinguishing_features: Died by repeatedly hitting his head against a wall
Welch McGovern.accessories: Gold pocket watch, leather-bound ancient notebook
Welch McGovern.source_notes: Police confirmed his death by apparent suicide in his house.
